title: Apache Polaris Iceberg catalog
summary: Iceberg REST catalog target for the GCS warehouse bucket.

security.auth: Keycloak/OIDC planned, GCS Workload Identity for warehouse service account
security.notes: Warehouse isolation and vended credentials must be validated before production use.

blockers: Wait for GCS UAT baseline before enabling Polaris.

notes: Polaris is preferred over Lakekeeper for v1 to match SSPCloud fidelity.
